verdict: Cetaphil's night cream prioritizes barrier safety with ceramides and panthenol alongside retinol, making it suitable for irritation-prone skin and compromised barriers. Dermatologist-recommended gentleness meets anti-aging ambition.

_research.name: Retinol Night Cream
pros: Ceramide and panthenol support barrier health
_research.con: Conservative retinol dosing may underwhelm users seeking aggressive anti-aging action.
